prompt: Portrait of a handsome middle-aged Spanish man with sharp facial features, intense dark eyes, and short styled dark hair with some gray strands, looking directly at the camera with a serious and confident expression. He is wearing a stylish white blazer over a white embroidered guayabera-style shirt. He stands with both hands on his hips in a strong pose. The background features a sunlit rustic wall with warm golden sunlight casting dramatic shadows, vibrant red bougainvillea flowers blooming on the left side, and colorful traditional Spanish tiles at the bottom. Cinematic lighting, high detail, photorealistic, movie poster style. Text overlay at the bottom reads: 'LA CASA DE PAPEL BERLÍN Y LA DAMA DEL ARMIÑO' with 'SOLO EN NETFLIX | 15 DE MAYO' below it.
